import Mathlib.GroupTheory.SpecificGroups.Cyclic.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic

theorem isCyclic_of_prime_card_fintype {G : Type*} [Group G] [Fintype G] (h : Nat.Prime (Fintype.card G)) :
    IsCyclic G := by
  -- Let p = |G|, which is prime
  have h_card : Nat.card G = Fintype.card G := by simp
  -- G is nontrivial because |G| is prime (primes are > 1)
  have h_nontrivial : Nontrivial G := by
    rw [h_card]
    exact Nat.one_lt_prime.mp h.property
  -- Pick an element g ≠ 1
  have h_exists : ∃ g : G, g ≠ 1 := by
    obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := exists_ne_one h_nontrivial
    exact ⟨g, hg⟩
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := h_exists
  -- The subgroup generated by g has order dividing |G| = p
  -- Since g ≠ 1, the order is > 1, hence equal to p
  -- Therefore G = ⟨g⟩, so G is cyclic
  refine' ⟨g, _⟩
  -- Use the lemma from mathlib
  have h_sub : Subgroup.closure {g} = ⊤ := by
    have h_card_sub : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) ∣ Nat.card G := Subgroup.card_dvd_card
    have h_card_sub' : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) ∣ p := by rw [h_card]; exact h_card_sub
    have h_card_sub_ne_one : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) ≠ 1 := by
      intro heq
      have : g = 1 := by
        have := Subgroup.card_eq_one_iff.eq_one (Subgroup.closure {g})
        simp_all
      contradiction
    have h_card_sub_eq_p : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) = p := by
      have : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) ∣ p := h_card_sub'
      have : 1 < Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) := by
        by_contra h
        have : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) ≤ 1 := by omega
        have : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) = 1 := by
          simp [Nat.le_one_iff_eq_or_zero] at this
          omega
        contradiction
      exact Nat.eq_of_dvd_of_prime_dvd (by apply this) (by apply this)
    -- Convert to Fintype.card
    have h_card_sub_fintype : Fintype.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) = p := by
      rw [← Fintype.card_coe, Fintype.card_coe_univ]
      rw [h_card_sub_eq_p]
    have h_coe_top : (Subgroup.closure {g} : Set G) = Set.univ := by
      apply Set.eq_univ_of_forall
      intro x
      have h_mem : x ∈ Subgroup.closure {g} := by
        rw [← Fintype.mem_coe]
        exact Fintype.mem_univ x
      sorry
    rw [h_coe_top]
  exact mem_zpowers_of_prime_card h_card hg h.property

import Mathlib.GroupTheory.SpecificGroups.Cyclic.Basic
import Mathlib.Tactic

theorem isCyclic_of_prime_card_fintype {G : Type*} [Group G] [Fintype G] (h : Nat.Prime (Fintype.card G)) :
    IsCyclic G := by
  -- Let p = |G|
  let p := Fintype.card G
  -- p is prime
  have h_p : Nat.Prime p := h
  -- |G| = p
  have h_card : Nat.card G = p := by simp
  -- G is finite
  have h_finite : Finite G := Nat.finite_of_card_ne_zero (h ▸ h_p.ne_zero)
  -- G is nontrivial (since p is prime, p > 1)
  have h_nontrivial : Nontrivial G := Finite.one_lt_card_iff_nontrivial.mp (h ▸ h_p.one_lt)
  -- Pick an element g ≠ 1
  have : ∃ g : G, g ≠ 1 := by
    rcases exists_ne_one h_nontrivial with ⟨g, hg⟩
    exact ⟨g, hg⟩
  rcases this with ⟨g, hg⟩
  -- The subgroup generated by g has order dividing |G| = p
  have h_sub_card_div : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) ∣ Nat.card G := Subgroup.card_dvd_card
  have h_sub_card_div_p : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) ∣ p := by rw [h_card]; exact h_sub_card_div
  -- The order of ⟨g⟩ is not 1 (since g ≠ 1)
  have h_sub_card_ne_one : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) ≠ 1 := by
    intro h_eq_one
    have : g = 1 := by
      have := Subgroup.card_eq_one_iff.eq_one (Subgroup.closure {g})
      simp_all
    contradiction
  -- Therefore the order of ⟨g⟩ is p (since it divides p and is > 1)
  have h_sub_card_eq_p : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) = p := by
    have : Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) ∣ p := h_sub_card_div_p
    have : 1 < Nat.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) := by
      omega
    rw [Nat.eq_of_dvd_of_prime_dvd]
    · apply this
    · apply this
  -- Hence ⟨g⟩ = G
  have h_sub_univ : (Subgroup.closure {g} : Set G) = Set.univ := by
    have : Fintype.card (Subgroup.closure {g}) = p := by
      rw [← Fintype.card_coe, Fintype.card_coe_univ]
      rw [h_sub_card_eq_p]
    have : Fintype.card G = p := by simp
    have : (Subgroup.closure {g} : Set G) = Set.univ := by
      apply Set.eq_univ_of_forall
      intro x
      have : x ∈ (Subgroup.closure {g} : Set G) := by
        rw [← Fintype.mem_coe]
        exact Fintype.mem_univ x
      exact this
    exact this
  -- Therefore G is cyclic generated by g
  exact mem_zpowers_of_prime_card h_card hg h_p
